summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.execution; import java.util.List; import java.util.stream.Collectors; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.selfdev.BranchVariant; public class DefaultSchedulingPolicy implements SchedulingPolicy { @Override public List<BranchVariant> selectVariants(List<BranchVariant> proposals, ExecutionBudget budget) { return proposals.stream() .limit(budget.getMaxVariantsAllowed()) .collect(Collectors.toList()); } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
